_meta.description: Deterministic policy thresholds per intent. NOT LLM-evaluated — pure rule checks.

response_templates.approved: Great news! Your annual fee of ${fee_amount} has been waived for this billing cycle. This will reflect on your next statement.
response_templates.denied_age: I'm sorry, fee waivers require at least 12 months of account history. Your account has been open for {account_age_months} months.
response_templates.denied_tier: Fee waivers are available for Silver tier and above. Your current tier is {loyalty_tier}. Would you like to learn how to upgrade?
response_templates.denied_limit: You've already received a fee waiver this year. The next eligible date is {next_eligible_date}.
response_templates.denied_spend: Fee waivers require minimum annual spending of $3,000. Your current annual spend is ${annual_spend}.
response_templates.collecting_slots: I'd be happy to help with a fee waiver. Could you provide the last four digits of your card?
response_templates.escalated: I'll connect you with a specialist who can review your fee waiver request in more detail.

response_templates.approved: Your credit limit has been increased from ${current_limit} to ${new_limit}. This is effective immediately.
response_templates.denied_age: Limit increases require at least 6 months of account history. Your account has been open for {account_age_months} months.
response_templates.denied_utilization: Your current utilization is {utilization_percent}%, which exceeds our threshold. We recommend reducing your balance first.
response_templates.denied_payments: Limit increases require at least 95% on-time payments. Your current rate is {on_time_percent}%.
response_templates.denied_cooldown: A limit change was processed recently. You'll be eligible again on {cooldown_end_date}.
response_templates.denied_amount: The requested increase exceeds the maximum allowed ({max_increase_percent}% of current limit). Maximum new limit: ${max_new_limit}.
response_templates.collecting_slots: I can look into a credit limit increase for you. Which card (last four digits) would you like the increase on?
response_templates.escalated: I'll transfer you to our credit team who can review your limit increase request.

response_templates.approved: A replacement card has been ordered. Expected delivery: {delivery_estimate}. Your card ending in {card_last_four} has been deactivated for security.
response_templates.approved_stolen: Your card has been frozen immediately and a replacement has been ordered. Expected delivery: {delivery_estimate}. A temporary digital card is available in your app.
response_templates.denied_limit: You've reached the maximum of {max_replacements} card replacements this year. Please contact us for assistance.
response_templates.collecting_slots: I'm sorry to hear about your card. Could you confirm the last four digits of the affected card?
response_templates.escalated: I'll connect you with our card services team for further assistance with your replacement.

ESCALATE.description: Fallback when intent is unclear or user requests human agent

response_templates.default: I understand you'd like additional assistance. Let me connect you with a specialist. Your conversation history will be transferred.
response_templates.low_confidence: I'm not entirely sure I understood your request correctly. Let me connect you with a specialist who can help.
response_templates.chain_break: I encountered an issue processing your request at the {failed_node} step. Transferring you to a specialist for manual review.
